name: mcp-server-aws-keyspaces
description: Amazon Keyspaces MCP server for interacting with Keyspaces and Apache Cassandra databases

rating.reason: Tool names are clear and purposeful. Descriptions are basic but functional, covering main functionality in 1-2 sentences. Parameter descriptions are clear and indicate purpose well. However, descriptions lack important context like usage scenarios, limitations (e.g., read-only nature), and details about what information is returned. The toolset is adequate for basic usage but leaves users with questions about constraints and expected outputs.
